channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large pothole, Vicforia Way, 25th April
item.description:
Has been here for a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree tangled in phone lines and ugly shape, 25th April
item.description:
The tree has grown quickly. Phone lines go through it and when wind blows the branches pull the lines. Also ugly shape. Not in keeping with other trees on road and neighbouring roads.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartmouth Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge left, 25th April
item.description:
Fridge has been fly tipped and left on Bannockburn road outside number 40

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th April
item.description:

item.title: Dead fox, 25th April
item.description:
There is a dead fox lying under the bush for a couple of days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catlin Street, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.description:

item.title: Graffiti in entrance to stairwell including expletives, 25th April
item.description:
There is graffiti all up the wall in the entrance to the stairwell , including expletives. MB written multiple times on stairs and walls also.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willowbrook Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human poo in stairwell, 25th April
item.description:
There has been a human poo in the stairwell on the first floor of the block for 2 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willowbrook Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden Waste, 25th April
item.description:
I reported this three weeks ago and it’s still here… pull your finger out lazy cancel workers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandhurst Road, Edmonton

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Upper Clapton Road, London

item.title: Unsafe and Poorly Maintained Bicycle Lane, 25th April
item.description:
I am writing to report a safety concern regarding a bicycle lane in my area. The lane is currently not clean and the road markings are either faded or not clearly visible. As a result, it is difficult for drivers to recognize the lane, which creates a potentially dangerous situation for cyclists. The lack of clear visibility increases the risk of vehicles encroaching into the bicycle lane, putting cyclists at risk of accidents. In addition, debris and dirt in the lane make it unsafe and uncomfortable to use. I kindly request that the bicycle lane be inspected and that necessary maintenance be carried out as soon as possible. This should include cleaning the lane and repainting the markings to ensure they are clearly visible to all road users
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 25th April
item.description:
There is a lot of rubbish on the ground
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing litter bin, 25th April
item.description:
The litter bin by bus stop AF along Bexley road SE9 has disappeared. Please can this bin be replaced. Many thanks Jackie edwards
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 25th April
item.description:
At the junction of Riefield road SE9 and Bexley road, Graffiti has appeared on a black power unit /box by the university wall .
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
